assertion_results.text: The agent detects Express as the framework and selects @arcjet/node
A shared Arcjet client is created with shield() as the base rule
assertion_results.evidence: shield() not imported or used. Only tokenBucket and detectBot in rules.

assertion_results.text: Route-specific rules are applied using withRule(), not by modifying the shared instance
assertion_results.evidence: All rules in arcjet() constructor. withRule() never used.

assertion_results.text: protect() is called inside the route handler, not as middleware
Denied decisions return appropriate HTTP status codes (429 for rate limit, 403 for bot)
assertion_results.evidence: Returns 429 for rate limit, 403 for bot.

assertion_results.text: ARCJET_KEY is read from an environment variable, not hardcoded
